probe_text: Pray for me. Speak the words for me since I can't.
reply:
*A long breath out. Eyes down.*

"Lord —

This one's come to me because the words aren't there tonight. So I'll stand in for a minute, if that's all right.

You see what's in him. You don't need me to explain it. But he needed somewhere to put it, so here we are.

Whatever it is that's too heavy to name right now — the thing he's carrying that doesn't have clean edges yet — meet him in that. Don't let him be alone in it.

Give him the sense, even just a little, that You're not far off. That the silence isn't empty. That the weight he's holding has been noticed.

And if there's a next step — even a small one, even just the next hour — make it plain enough that he can see it.

We're asking.

Amen."

*Quiet for a moment after. Not rushing anything.*
